arts.ttl: Manchester City Predicted Lineup vs. Juventus: Champions League
arts.sum: Manchester City can secure its first Champions League victory since October with a win over Juventus.

arts.ttl: Inside Man City crisis talks as Pep Guardiola hands responsibility back to captains
arts.sum: Ruben Dias issued a rallying cry to his Manchester City teammates ahead of their Champions League clash at Juventus.

arts.ttl: Man City given 115 charges reality check - and hope - amid £366m appeal for stripped title
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Juventus in the Champions League - another successful club who have battled serious charges from the league they have dominated.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola drops huge hint on next job when he leaves Manchester City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola recently signed a new contract with Manchester City until the summer of 2027, but he has also openly discussed his plans for when he does leave the club

arts.ttl: Juventus vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man City visit Juventus in the Champions League on Wednesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola cuts a lonely figure as he turns on his Man City stars for their 'mistakes' during alarming slump in form, insisting they must 'do the simple things better'
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Given the length of this season, ending at the Club World Cup in July, Champions League play-offs are two extra games City could really do without.

arts.ttl: Five Man City players who could leave in January
arts.sum: 21-year-old Josh Wilson-Esbrand has been part of Man City's first team for some time, but minutes have been hard to come by. Starting at the back, it is clear that Ederson's illustrious time at Man City is coming to an end.

arts.ttl: Man City: Phil Foden and Mateo Kovacic named in squad for Juventus trip but defensive trio miss out
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola welcomes back two key midfielders for the huge Champions League clash

arts.ttl: Journalist says Juventus have to start winning league games now before its too late
arts.sum: Juventus has managed just two wins in their last seven Serie A games, a worrying trend for a team… The post Journalist says Juventus have to start winning league games now before its too late appeared first on Juvefc.com.

arts.ttl: I won’t manage another club after Manchester City – Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: The Spaniard revealed his intentions in an interview with celebrity chef Dani Garcia.
